description: Perform a geometric analysis of the Muncie HEC-RAS model (using the HDF5 file `Muncie.p04.tmp.hdf`) to derive a Stage-Storage relationship (Elevation vs. Volume curve) for the entire river reach. Write a Python script to calculate the total static water volume in acre-feet within the river channel and floodplain at 1-foot elevation increments from 925 ft to 955 ft inclusive. Use the Average End Area method with Main Channel reach lengths for the volume calculations. Save the results to `/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/reach_storage_curve.csv` with the header `Elevation_ft,Volume_acft`. The environment has `h5py`, `numpy`, and `scipy` installed.
